title: Revenants
description: A relatively lightweight Modpack focused mainly on improving game features rather than adding new ones. 1.20.1/1.21.1
body:
![Logo - Revenants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b08d0a1b5e62e5a147ec54e6ddf6a80552ac61f6.png) ###

A lightweight modpack focusing on enhancing the vanilla experience

![Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375c821923a4af67ee7f1ed77b76084ffa842493.png) ##

About

**

The Revenants Modpack aims to enhance the Minecraft experience with improved visuals, immersive audio, and smoother performance. It introduces a variety of quality-of-life features, including better storage, minimaps, waypoints, and improved sound design, to refine gameplay without straying from the feel of vanilla Minecraft. Revenants is designed to be lightweight and accessible for a wide range of players, whether you're focused on building, exploring, or simply enjoying a more polished and immersive version of the base game.

** --- ![Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375c821923a4af67ee7f1ed77b76084ffa842493.png) ##

Features

- **🏔️Improved Terrain** - Vast mountain ranges, realistic rivers, better beaches and more! - **🦋Overworld Life** - With mods like [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist), and [Critters & Companions](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions) adding over 40 new animals! - **🌊Ocean Life** - With mods like [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide), and [Boids](https://modrinth.com/mod/boids) enhancing the oceans and fish behaviors! - **🎧Realistic Sounds** - Realistic audio with better physics, cave & nature sounds such as birds chirping! - **👁️Enhanced Visuals** - Improved visuals with effects such as particles, weather and falling leaf effects. - **🍴A Full Table** - A vast selection of cooking and baking mods to fulfill your kitchen dreams! - **🏡Builder's Dream** - With mods like [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), [Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow), and [BBB](https://modrinth.com/mod/building-but-better) providing a complete building experience. - **⚙️Technology Era** - With [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and its add-ons allowing for moving contraptions, trains and more! - **🚊Transportation** - Trains, planes and improved vanilla ships allow for cargo and human transportation! - **🔥Immersive Nether** - With over 10 new biomes and improvements to the vanilla ones! - **🔮Immersive End** - With over 24 new biomes, improved end cities, and a reworked ender dragon fight! - **🫀Deeper & Darker** - A new dimension added to Minecraft, filled with darkness. - **🧭Quality of Life** – Includes minimaps, waypoints, better storage systems, and more. - **🌎Optimisation** - Mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) allow for the modpack to run better than vanilla Minecraft! ![Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375c821923a4af67ee7f1ed77b76084ffa842493.png) ##
